response.justification: Bogdan has 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies, including cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and performance optimization. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of AI specialization, AI-powered products, or leadership in AI strategy—key requirements for this role. His recent work in AI-agent tooling is promising but not fully aligned with the job's focus on AI product strategy and cloud innovation.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Strong track record in performance optimization and scalable systems (e.g., low-latency apps at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No clear demonstration of AI expertise, AI-powered product development, or AI strategy leadership
Limited evidence of entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
Most recent roles focus on general software engineering rather than AI/cloud innovation
